推荐场景: 酒店前台｜核对预订和证件
60秒任务: 「办理入住」：入住/房间/服务时间确认；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 入住｜房间信息｜服务时间｜小问题｜礼貌请求
场景族: 酒店前台｜房间｜早餐区｜机场｜旅行服务台
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I have a booking.（说明预订）
My name is ___.（报姓名）
Can I check in now?（办理入住）
Here is my passport.（递交证件）
What is my room number?（询问房号）
Is breakfast included?（确认早餐）
What time is check-in?（询问时间）
Can I leave my bag here?（寄存行李）
Could you repeat that, please?（请求重复）
How do I get to my room?（问路线）
The elevator is over there.（指示电梯）
Please fill in this form.（填表）
I booked one night.（入住晚数）
I need a quiet room.（房间偏好）
Thank you for your help.（感谢）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: booking, passport, room, key card, bag, elevator, form, breakfast, night, hotel
Verbs: check in, book, show, fill in, leave, take, repeat, help
Adjectives: quiet, clean, ready, included
Time / Place: now, tonight, tomorrow, at the front desk, upstairs
Chunks: room number, key card, hotel booking, one night, check-in time
